---
title: "How Bias Has Been Studied in NLP"
description: "A Microsoft Research paper surveying how bias has been studied in NLP — and how we can do better."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-06-07"
categories: [NLP, ethics, paper, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![How bias has been studied in NLP. Image from [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2005.14050).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

We can do better: how bias has been studied in the NLP community.

Paper from MSR: <https://lnkd.in/gdJEuWe>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_bias-nlp-msr-activity-6675261106300301312-x717).*
